title: Curry  咖喱
text:
Ingredients | 用料









Ingredient
用料
Amount
份量




Protein of choice (chicken, beef, etc.)
蛋白质（鸡肉、牛肉）
200 g
200克


Curry roux block
咖喱块
50 g
50克


Milk
牛奶
50 ml
50毫升


Potato
土豆
1
一个


Carrot
胡萝卜
1
一根


Onion
洋葱
Half
半颗





Method | 步骤

Cut the meat, carrot, potato, and onion into chunks. (Onion slightly larger pieces)
将肉、胡萝卜、土豆、洋葱切块。（洋葱切大点）
Heat oil in a pot and stir-fry all the ingredients until partially cooked.
锅中热油，放入食材翻炒到食材断生。
Add enough water to just cover the ingredients. Once boiling, reduce to low heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
锅中加水莫过食材，水沸后转小火焖煮20分钟。
Add the curry block and stir until fully dissolved.
加入咖喱块搅拌至完全融化。
Turn up the heat, add milk, and simmer until the sauce thickens. Serve.
开大火并加入牛奶，收汁后出锅。

title: Matcha Swiss Roll  抹茶瑞士卷
text:
Ingredients | 用料

Cake | 蛋糕




Ingredient
用料
Amount
份量




Eggs
鸡蛋
4 (60 g each)
4个（单个约60克）


Matcha powder
抹茶粉
10 g
10克


Hot water
热水
80 g
80克


Sugar (for yolk)
细砂糖（蛋黄用）
15 g
15克


Vegetable oil
色拉油
40 g
40克


Cake flour
低筋面粉
65 g
65克


Sugar (for whites)
细砂糖（蛋白用）
60 g
60克




Filling | 夹馅




Ingredient
用料
Amount
份量




Heavy cream
淡奶油
150 g
150克


Sugar
细砂糖
15 g
15克


Strawberries
草莓
As needed
适量




Topping | 淋面




Ingredient
用料
Amount
份量




Chocolate
巧克力
150 g
150克


Coconut oil
椰子油
30 g
30克


Crushed hazelnuts
榛子碎
As needed
适量





Method | 步骤

Whisk hot water into matcha powder until smooth. If using high-quality matcha, reduce to 8 g. Prepare baking sheet with heatproof parchment.
将热水慢慢倒入抹茶粉中调均匀备用。若用好抹茶可减至8克。铺好高温油布。
Separate eggs. Add 15 g sugar to yolks and mix, then stir in oil and matcha liquid in portions.
蛋黄中加入15克细砂糖拌匀，再分次加入油和抹茶液搅匀。
Sift in cake flour and fold with spatula until no dry flour remains.
筛入低筋面粉，用刮刀切拌至无干粉状态。
Whip egg whites with sugar in 3 additions until soft peaks (wet foam).
蛋白分三次加糖打至湿性发泡（大弯钩）。
Fold meringue into yolk mixture in three parts. Pour into tray and gently tap to remove air.
蛋白分三次切拌入蛋黄糊中，倒入烤盘轻震几下。
Bake at 180°C for about 18 minutes. Adjust time based on your oven.
180°C烘烤18分钟左右，视烤箱调整。
Remove and invert onto cooling rack. Peel off parchment.
出炉后倒扣放凉，撕去油布。
While still warm, roll cake with help of rolling pin to shape.
趁温热借助擀面杖卷起定型，温热时不易裂。
Whip cream with sugar until stiff. Unroll cake, spread cream, and add sliced strawberries.
奶油+糖打发至不流动，展开蛋糕卷抹上奶油，三分之一处放草莓。
Roll up tightly and chill in fridge for 2 hours.
卷起后冷藏2小时。
Melt chocolate with coconut oil, mix in hazelnuts.
隔水融化巧克力，加入椰子油和榛子碎。
Pour glaze over cake, refrigerate another 30 minutes before slicing.
淋在蛋糕卷上，冷藏半小时后切块。

Reference

title: Pork Rib Soup with Kelp  排骨海带汤
text:
Ingredients | 用料



Ingredient
用料
Amount
份量




Pork ribs
排骨
250 g
250克


Kelp
海带
As needed
适量


Ginger
姜
1 small piece
一小块


Scallion
葱
2 stalks
两根


Cooking wine
料酒
1 spoon
一勺


Vinegar
醋
½ spoon
一小勺


Salt and white pepper
盐和白胡椒
To taste
适量





Method | 步骤

In a pot with cold water, add pork ribs, cooking wine, and sliced ginger. Bring to a boil, then remove and drain ribs.
焯水：冷水锅中加入排骨、料酒和姜片。水沸后捞出排骨。
Heat oil in a pan and lightly brown the ribs.
热锅烧油后加入排骨，炒至表面微黄。
Transfer ribs to a rice cooker. Add ginger slices and hot water to cover. Select “Soup” mode and cook for 2 hours.
排骨放入电饭煲，加入姜片和热水，没过排骨。选择“煲汤”，炖2小时。
Add vinegar, white pepper, and kelp. Continue to cook for 10 more minutes.
加入醋、白胡椒粉和海带，再炖10分钟。
Season with salt to taste and serve.
根据口味加盐调味后即可食用。

title: Silver Ear Lotus Seed Soup  银耳莲子羹
text:
Ingredients | 用料



Ingredient
用料
Amount
份量




Silver ear fungus
银耳
Half piece
半朵


Lotus seeds
莲子
About 20 pieces
20颗左右


Rock sugar
冰糖
To taste
依口味调整


Water
水
Enough to cover ingredients
没过食材即可





Method | 步骤

Soak the silver ear fungus and lotus seeds in water for 1–2 hours until softened.
银耳和莲子泡发1～2小时。
Tear the silver ear fungus into small pieces.
银耳撕碎。
Wash the soaked ingredients thoroughly and place them into a rice cooker.
银耳和莲子洗干净后放入电饭煲。
Add water until the ingredients are fully submerged.
加水莫过银耳。
Add rock sugar according to taste preference.
按个人喜好加糖。
Use the “Soup” setting on the rice cooker and cook for at least 2 hours.
选择“煲汤”功能，煮两个小时以上。

title: Bell Pepper Pork  青椒肉丝
text:
Ingredients | 用料



Ingredient
用料
Amount
份量




Pork tenderloin
猪里脊
250 g
250克


Green pepper
青椒
2 pieces
2个


Garlic (minced)
蒜末
3 cloves
3瓣


Ginger
生姜
A small piece
1小块


Light soy sauce
生抽
2 spoons
2勺


Cooking wine
料酒
1 spoon
1勺


Starch
生粉
2 spoons
2勺


Salt
盐
To taste
适量


White pepper powder
白胡椒粉
To taste
适量





Method | 步骤

Prepare ingredients: Slice pork into strips, deseed and slice green peppers, mince garlic.
准备材料：瘦肉切丝，青椒去籽切丝，蒜切末备用。
Marinate pork with 1 spoon cooking wine, 1 spoon soy sauce, 1 spoon starch, and a pinch of salt and white pepper powder. Add a bit of oil and mix clockwise until evenly coated.
将肉丝腌制：1勺料酒、1勺生抽、1勺生粉、少许盐和白胡椒粉，最后加一点油，顺时针搅拌均匀备用。
Heat oil in a pan and stir-fry the pork strips until they change color.
锅中倒入适量油，烧热后倒入肉丝炒至变色。
Adjust seasoning with salt if needed, then add minced ginger and garlic. Stir-fry until aromatic.
根据肉的咸淡加盐，加入姜蒜末翻炒出香味。
Add green pepper strips, stir-fry until slightly softened, then drizzle soy sauce along the side of the pan. Thicken with a bit of starch water and finish when the sauce is slightly reduced.
倒入青椒丝炒至断生，锅边淋入酱油，倒入一些生粉水勾芡，收汁即可。

title: Tiramisu  提拉米苏
text:
Ingredients | 用料



Ingredient
用料
Amount
份量




Egg yolk
蛋黄
1
一个


Sugar
白砂糖
25 g
25克


Water
水
6 g
6克


Gelatin powder
吉利丁
5 g
5克


Mascarpone cheese
马斯卡彭
120 g
120克


Whipping cream
淡奶油
160 g
160克


Cocoa powder
可可粉
As needed
适量


Ladyfingers
手指饼干
As needed
适量





Method | 步骤

In a bowl over hot water, whisk egg yolk, sugar, and water until pale and thick.
容器中加入蛋黄、白砂糖和水，隔热水搅拌至发白膨胀。
Add gelatin and mix until fully dissolved.
加入吉利丁粉，搅拌均匀。
Remove from heat and mix in mascarpone until smooth.
从热水中拿出后加入马斯卡彭，搅拌均匀。
Whip cream until thick, then fold into the mascarpone mixture.
淡奶油打发至浓稠状态后，加入容器中搅拌均匀。
Pour half of the mixture into a container, layer with ladyfingers, then top with the remaining mixture.
倒入一半液体，铺上一层手指饼干，再倒入剩下的液体。
Dust the top with cocoa powder.
表面撒上一层可可粉。
Chill in refrigerator for 2 hours before serving.
冰箱冷藏2小时后即可享用。

title: Zhiyuan Zhou
text:
I recently graduated from UCLA with degrees in Economics and Statistics & Data Science, and I’m currently pursuing my Master of Public Policy at the University of Chicago.
My work mainly focuses on statistical modeling, data engineering, applied machine learning, and decision support systems.

title: WeChat Chatbot
text:
Summary
This Python chatbot prototype automates WeChat message handling and generates responses through the OpenAI API. The project demonstrates integration between desktop automation, conversation state management, and large language model services.

title: WeChat Chatbot
text:
Scope

Retrieve and process WeChat messages with wxauto.
Maintain conversation context for more coherent responses.
Run message handling in a background process.
Log activity for debugging and review.

title: WeChat Chatbot
text:
Implementation
The prototype is designed for PC WeChat version 3.9.11.17. Core tools include Python, OpenAI API, wxauto, threading, and logging.
Repository: ChatBot_WeChat

title: Stock Forecasting with Time Series Models
text:
Summary
This project compares statistical and machine learning approaches for stock price forecasting. The analysis was developed in R and focuses on data preparation, technical indicators, model estimation, and performance evaluation.

title: Stock Forecasting with Time Series Models
text:
Methods

Retrieved market data from Yahoo Finance with quantmod.
Engineered indicators including Bollinger Bands, MACD, and RSI.
Estimated ARIMAX, NNETAR, XGBoost, GARCH, and combined forecasting models.
Evaluated results with error metrics including MAPE and MSE.

title: Stock Forecasting with Time Series Models
text:
Deliverables

Step-by-step analysis
Visualization report

title: Stock Forecasting with Time Series Models
text:
Tools
R, tidyverse, lubridate, quantmod, tseries, forecast, tsibble, fable, fabletools, feasts, xgboost, caret, rugarch.

title: Trade Bot
text:
Summary
This project is under development. The intended system is a trading automation prototype that evaluates market signals, applies rule-based decision logic, and records trading activity for review.

title: Trade Bot
text:
Planned Scope

Market data ingestion.
Signal generation and strategy testing.
Execution logic with risk controls.
Logging and performance reporting.

title: Trade Bot
text:
Status
Design and implementation are in progress.

title: Personal Memo System: SQL, React, and Python
text:
Summary
This full-stack application organizes personal records across areas such as health, finance, habits, and goals. It combines structured storage, analysis, and automation in a single workflow for personal data management.

title: Personal Memo System: SQL, React, and Python
text:
Scope

Record memos, metrics, categories, tags, and user information through a REST API.
Support metric tracking and dashboard-based review of personal trends.
Provide authentication, backups, audit logs, and deployable infrastructure.

title: Personal Memo System: SQL, React, and Python
text:
Implementation

Backend: FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, Alembic, Redis, MySQL.
Frontend: React, TypeScript, Chart.js, Axios, Material UI, Tailwind CSS.
Analysis and automation: Python, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Docker.

title: Personal Memo System: SQL, React, and Python
text:
Deliverables

API documentation through Swagger UI.
Configurable dashboard for memo entry, browsing, and metric visualization.
Python analysis tools for summaries, plots, and trend review.

Repository: MemoTrack-SQL

title: Statistical Privacy
text:
Summary
This work-in-progress project studies statistical privacy methods and their implications for data analysis. The current deliverable is an exploratory report.

title: Statistical Privacy
text:
Status

Draft analysis available.
Additional synthesis and documentation are pending.

Artifact: Step-by-step file

title: Excel VBA Sales Management Tool
text:
Summary
This Excel-based tool supports sales recordkeeping for a small online store. It reduces manual entry work by standardizing input fields, validating records, and generating visual summaries from workbook data.

title: Excel VBA Sales Management Tool
text:
Scope

Structured sales data entry and validation.
Adjustable fields for changing business needs.
Batch entry workflows for repeated transactions.
Automated chart generation for sales review.

title: Excel VBA Sales Management Tool
text:
Implementation
The tool is implemented in Excel with VBA. It keeps the workflow inside a familiar spreadsheet environment while adding automation for repetitive recordkeeping and reporting tasks.
Repository: excel-ledger

title: Stir-fried Spicy Beef  小炒牛肉
text:
Ingredients | 用料



Ingredient
用料
Amount
份量




Yellow beef
黄牛肉
250 g
250克


Ginger
姜
A small piece
一小块


Garlic
蒜
Half bulb
半颗左右


Oyster sauce
蚝油
2 spoons
2勺


White pepper powder
白胡椒粉
A pinch
少许


Canola oil
菜籽油
As needed
适量


Small chili peppers
小米辣
4 pieces
4个


Pickled peppers
泡椒
1 handful
一把


Cilantro
香菜
A small bunch
一撮





Method | 步骤

Slice the beef against the grain into thin pieces. Marinate with 3 spoons salad oil, 2 spoons of oyster sauce, a pinch of white pepper powder, and a little starch. Mix well, then add 1 more spoon of oil to lock in moisture.
黄牛肉逆着纹理切小片，加3勺色拉油、2勺蚝油、少量白胡椒粉抓匀，再加一点淀粉抓匀，最后再来一勺油抓一下锁水。
Mince the ginger, chop the chili peppers and pickled peppers into segments, and crush and chop the garlic.
生姜切小丁，小米辣（红色的）和泡椒切段，8颗蒜拍扁后切粒。
Heat a pan until smoking hot, then add oil. Stir-fry the beef with a pinch of salt until just cooked and remove quickly to prevent toughness.
锅烧热，要烧到冒烟再倒油，油热后倒入牛肉快速翻炒，加一点盐，变色就捞出，动作要快。
Cut cilantro into 3–4 cm segments.
香菜切成3–4厘米段，不要太长以免影响炒制时间。
In remaining oil, add ginger, garlic, and chilies. Stir-fry until fragrant, then add a dash of soy sauce.
锅里留些油，放入姜蒜辣椒爆香，加入少许生抽。
Return beef to the pan, toss briefly, then add cilantro and stir just until combined. Serve immediately.
倒入牛肉翻炒几下，再倒入香菜段，关火后快速翻炒均匀，出锅。

title: Chocolate Chip Cookies  巧克力曲奇
text:
Ingredients | 用料



Ingredient
用料
Amount
份量




Unsalted butter (softened)
无盐黄油（软化）
225 g
225克


Light brown sugar
红糖
100 g
100克


Granulated sugar
白砂糖
100 g
100克


Milk
牛奶
30 ml
30毫升


Eggs (large)
鸡蛋（大）
2
2个


All-purpose flour
中筋面粉
400 g
400克


Baking powder
泡打粉
5 g
5克


Salt
盐
10 g
10克


Chocolate chips
巧克力豆
300 g
300克





Method | 步骤

Melt the butter and stir on medium heat until light brown. 将黄油放入锅中，中火加热并搅拌，直到颜色变为浅棕色。
Remove from heat and add both sugars, stirring until combined. 离火后加入红糖和白糖，搅拌至混合均匀。
Gradually add milk and stir until the mixture becomes a slightly runny paste. 逐渐加入牛奶，搅拌至呈稀一点的膏状。
Let the mixture cool down slightly, then add eggs and stir until smooth. 稍微放凉后加入鸡蛋，搅拌至顺滑。
Transfer the mixture to a large bowl, then add flour, salt, baking powder, and chocolate. 将混合物倒入大碗中，加入面粉、盐、泡打粉和巧克力。
Stir until everything is evenly mixed and smooth. 搅拌至完全均匀、顺滑。
Preheat the oven to 165°C (330°F). 将烤箱预热至165°C（330°F）。
Scoop about 75 g of cookie dough per cookie and form into balls. 取约75克面团一份，搓成圆球状。
Bake for about 13 minutes. 烘烤约13分钟。
Remove the tray and let the cookies cool (do not poke them — they’ll be very soft). 取出烤盘，放凉（不要戳饼干，刚出炉时非常柔软）。

Reference

title: Shrimp Taco  虾肉塔可
text:
Ingredients | 用料









Ingredient
用料
Amount
份量




Large shrimp (raw, peeled, deveined)
大虾（去壳去肠线）
5–8 pieces
5–8只


Vegetable oil
植物油
20 mL
20毫升


Bacon (cooked and crumbled)
培根（煎熟切碎）
1 slice
1片


Freshly ground black pepper
现磨黑胡椒
To lightly coat shrimp
适量，轻撒


Minced garlic
蒜末
4 cloves
4瓣


Chili & lime powder
辣椒青柠粉
To lightly coat shrimp
适量，轻撒


Salt
盐
Pinch
一撮


White onion (diced)
白洋葱（切丁）
1 small (to taste)
1个小洋葱（依个人口味）


Fresh cilantro (finely chopped)
香菜（切碎）
To taste
依个人口味


Shredded Mexican blend cheese
墨西哥混合芝士碎
As needed (for tortillas)
适量（根据饼大小）


Tortillas
玉米饼/面饼
3 pieces
3张


Avocado (sliced)
牛油果（切片）
1
1个


Preferred sauce (Chipotle, Peri-Peri, Tartar, etc.)
喜好酱料（如烟熏辣椒酱、非洲辣酱、塔塔酱等）
To taste
依个人口味





Method | 步骤

Prep the shrimp: Peel, devein, remove the tails, rinse, drain, and pat dry with paper towels.
准备虾仁：剥壳去虾线，去掉尾部，清洗后沥干，用厨房纸吸干水分。
Mix marinade: In a large bowl, combine shrimp, vegetable oil, black pepper, chili & lime powder, minced garlic, and a pinch of salt.
调制腌料：在大碗中放入虾仁、植物油、黑胡椒、辣椒青柠粉、蒜末和一撮盐，搅拌均匀。
Marinate for at least 30 minutes.
腌制：静置腌制至少30分钟，让味道充分渗入。
Prepare toppings: While marinating, dice the onion, chop the cilantro, and slice the avocado.
准备配料：腌制期间，将洋葱切丁，香菜切碎，牛油果切片。
Preheat skillet: Heat a large nonstick pan over medium heat.
加热锅具：中火预热不粘锅。
Form cheese base: Sprinkle shredded cheese in a circle slightly smaller than a tortilla directly onto the hot skillet.
制作芝士底：在热锅上撒入一圈比玉米饼略小的芝士碎。
Toast tortilla: Press a tortilla onto the melting cheese and cook for about 1 minute until lightly crisp. Flip and cook the other side, then transfer to a plate.
烘烤玉米饼：将玉米饼压在融化的芝士上，煎约1分钟至微脆，翻面再煎片刻后取出备用。
Cook bacon: In the same pan, cook the bacon until crisp, then crumble and set aside in a small bowl.
煎培根：利用同一平底锅煎培根至酥脆，取出切碎备用。
Cook shrimp: Use the leftover bacon oil to stir-fry the marinated shrimp until fully cooked and slightly browned.
炒虾仁：用剩下的培根油炒虾仁，至熟透且表面微焦。
Assemble the tacos: On each tortilla, layer shrimp, bacon, avocado slices, diced onion, cilantro, and your preferred sauce (Chipotle, Peri-Peri, Tartar, etc.). Serve warm.
组装塔可：在每张玉米饼上依次放入虾仁、培根、牛油果片、洋葱丁、香菜及喜好酱料（如烟熏辣椒酱、非洲辣酱或塔塔酱），趁热享用。

title: Kale Salad  羽衣甘蓝沙拉
text:
Ingredients | 用料



Ingredient
用料
Amount
份量




Sweet potato
红薯
1 large
一个


Kale
羽衣甘蓝
3–4 stalks
3–4根


Cooked chicken
熟鸡肉
200 g
200克


Apple
苹果
1
一个


Grape tomatoes
圣女果
8 pieces
8个


Goat cheese
山羊奶酪
20 g
20克


Balsamic vinegar
意大利香醋
To taste
适量


Olive oil
橄榄油
To taste
适量


Salt and pepper
盐和黑胡椒
To taste
适量





Method | 步骤

Preheat the oven to 200°C.
将烤箱预热至200°C。
Wash and cut the sweet potato in half lengthwise, then slice thinly.
将红薯洗净，纵向切半，再切成薄片。
Place sweet potato slices on a baking sheet, spray with oil, and season with salt and pepper. Roast for 40 minutes.
将红薯片放入烤盘，喷油，加盐和黑胡椒调味，烘烤40分钟。
Wash the kale, remove stems, and chop the leaves into bite-sized pieces.
羽衣甘蓝洗净去茎，切成小块。
Chop apple, grape tomatoes, and cooked chicken into bite-sized pieces.
将苹果、圣女果和熟鸡肉切块。
Combine kale, chicken, apple, grape tomatoes, and goat cheese in a bowl.
将羽衣甘蓝、鸡肉、苹果、圣女果和山羊奶酪放入碗中。
Drizzle with balsamic vinegar and olive oil. Toss to combine and serve.
淋上香醋和橄榄油，搅拌均匀即可食用。

Reference

title: Hot Dried Noodles  干拌面
text:
Ingredients | 用料



Ingredient
用料
Amount
份量




Noodles
面条
As needed
适量


Chili soy sauce (or spicy dipping sauce)
鲜辣露
1 spoon
一勺


Light soy sauce
生抽
2 spoons
两勺


Peanut butter
花生酱
1 spoon
一勺


Vinegar
醋
½ spoon
一小勺


Sesame oil
香油
1 spoon
一勺


Ground meat
肉沫
50 g
50克


Cooking wine
料酒
½ spoon
一小勺


Scallion
葱
1 stalk
一根


Garlic
蒜
2 cloves
两瓣


Salt
盐
To taste
适量





Method | 步骤

Finely chop garlic and scallion, set aside.
蒜和葱切碎备用。
Heat oil in a pan, stir-fry ground meat until browned, add cooking wine and stir. Add garlic and salt to taste, then remove and set aside.
热锅烧油后加入肉沫，炒开后加入料酒翻炒。加入蒜和适量盐调味。乘出备用。
In a large bowl, add chili soy sauce, soy sauce, peanut butter, vinegar, and sesame oil.
碗中加入鲜辣露，生抽，花生酱，醋和香油。
Boil water and cook the noodles until done. Transfer noodles to the bowl.
锅中加水烧沸煮面，熟后放入碗中。
Top with prepared meat and chopped scallion, mix thoroughly, and serve.
碗中加入葱和炒好的肉末，搅拌均匀即可食用。
